full_text:
Qin Xie (Chuqi) 秦頡 (初起)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Qin Xie (秦頡), styledChuqi (初起), was born in Nan. Killed Zhang Mancheng and Han Zhong before being killed in a mutiny. Qin Xie was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Qin Xie lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
